_notes: City Kit Suburban. Prefab-only (no GridMap palette): driveway/path pieces are weld prefabs like all other decoration; a farm gravel lane is a RoadPath, not a driveway lattice. Scale 12 (unified with the 12 m city roads) so houses sit right on the streets (building-type-a -> 15.6 x 10.1 x 12.3 m). Authored clean (XZ-centered, Y=0 base).
